headline: William Shatner Has More 'Elon Dollars' Courtesy of Musk — But Makes It Clear X Money Is Fiat, Not Crypto
summary: Actor William Shatner stated on Sunday, March 8, that the X Money payments service uses fiat money backed by a "real bank" and has nothing to do with cryptocurrency.
